observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with stamping fault
Visual pattern suggesting missing or broken teeth
Localized deviation from normal zipper appearance
mechanism_explanation: Die wear or misalignment during teeth stamping produces defective teeth.
defect_region: along the zipper teeth or fabric
severity_visual_description: critical missing or broken teeth visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace worn stamping dies and adjust feed alignment.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the missing or broken teeth would be absent and surface appears normal.
